mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mcp_server_config (name, transport, command, args, url, headers, description, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{transport}, #{command}, #{args}::jsonb, #{url}, #{headers}::jsonb, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, transport, command, args, url, headers, description, created_at, updated_at FROM mcp_server_config ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, name, transport, command, args, url, headers, description, created_at, updated_at FROM mcp_server_config WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, name, transport, command, args, url, headers, description, created_at, updated_at FROM mcp_server_config WHERE name = #{name}
